channel.title: Market Drip - Trending Tickers & Volatility Analysis
channel.description: Deep dive into top gainers, losers, and trending tickers. Get the hottest market insights every morning.

item.title: VKTX Surges 14.8%, Was the Oral Obesity Drug Phase 3 Really This Big of a News?
item.description: Today's post is a space to take it step by step?why VKTX suddenly caught the market's attention, and whether this flow is real or just overblown expectations. The numbers and news are clear, but we'll organize it so we don't jump to conclusions too hastily.

item.title: ARTL Surges 40%! The Story of Breaking Into the Glaucoma Market Without Spending a Dime
item.description: They say biotech stocks are all about 'expectations,' but this time, a real catalyst dropped. I'll pick out just the facts and explain in the easiest way possible why people are suddenly going wild over ARTL and whether there's an actual chance this drug makes it.

item.title: S&P 500 Earnings Calendar - UPDATE 2026-03-23
item.description: Upcoming S&P 500 earnings announcements from 2026-03-09 to 2026-04-22. Track estimated EPS and release dates. Updated 2026-03-23.

item.title: TLYS, why did it jump so much? What really happened after the earnings turnaround
item.description: This article explains why TLYS suddenly became a hot stock, how the numbers and news fit together, and what the next 3–12 months might look like in plain, conversational English.

item.title: SWMR, from $5 IPO price to $31 – Drone war/AI story ignites in one day
item.description: Swarmer(SWMR) went from $5 IPO to $31 close, $40 intraday high. Breaking down this drone war, AI, defense budget expansion story from fundamentals/policy/market sentiment perspectives.

item.title: Why Is PLTR Swinging So Much Lately? Let’s Look at Government, AI, and Valuation in One Shot
item.description: This post looks at PLTR by weaving together the defense/government AI story, the 2026 growth outlook, and the question of “why are people piling in even at this price,” focusing on what to be cautious about and what to watch over the next 3–12 months in a conversational way.

item.title: Oracle (ORCL) jumps 9% after earnings – is it finally a real AI winner?
item.description: In this post, we’ll walk through why Oracle (ORCL) ran more than 9% in the day following its Q3 earnings, using core numbers like EPS, revenue, and cloud growth along with the **AI infrastructure story** so you can get a feel for whether this is real strength or just short-term heat.

item.title: LGVN, the biotech stock that jumped 70% today — real opportunity or a one-shot trap?
item.description: Today’s LGVN move was not about earnings but about a capital raise of up to $30 million lining up with its clinical timeline, so the right lens is this: the company now has more breathing room financially, but dilution risk and volatility came with it.

item.title: Why MRVL Was So Hot Today: AI Hype That Was Bigger Than Earnings
item.description: This post is really about one thing: why MRVL became one of the hottest names in the market today. We’ll keep the numbers to what actually matters, skip the intimidating jargon, and walk through where the excitement and the anxiety are both coming from.

item.title: “Why did TPET go crazy today?” The real story behind a 70% one-day spike
item.description: If you had to pick the loudest small-cap energy name in the U.S. market right now, it’d be hard not to mention TPET. We’re talking more than a 70% jump in a single day, a 160%+ spike just before that, all while the company is tweaking its ATM equity offering size and lining up initial output of around 30–40 barrels from its Alberta wells. In this post, I’ll walk through why it’s moving like this, where the story ends, and where the real risk begins.

item.title: PLTR: NATO Deals and Stellar Earnings? Is It a Good Time to Jump In?
item.description: AI, defense, and insane growth meet in PLTR! I'll explain like a savvy friend why it was so hot today and what risks we really need to watch out for.

item.title: MongoDB is running again? Why AI database expectations are heating up again
item.description: MongoDB isn’t just a database that developers like anymore, it’s treated as a name you can’t easily leave out of the AI·cloud infrastructure conversation. In this post, we’re going to organize what this current price zone means, using the simple question “why is it up again?” and tying together recent news, flows, and risks.

item.title: Tesla Stock Recovers $400! Jumping TSLA, Is It Time to Jump In?
item.description: Today, Tesla's stock price literally rode a 'rollercoaster.' It dropped scarily early on but managed to reclaim $400 by the close; let me break down why this happened using numbers and news.

item.title: TPET Skyrockets 179% in a Day - Why You'll Regret Missing This Mini Oil Stock Story
item.description: In this post, we'll look at why TPET jumped 179% in one day, focusing on the combination of 'geopolitical theme + Alberta oil field expectations + debt clearance' rather than just looking at charts. I'll explain the numbers as simply as possible.

item.title: Broadcom(AVGO) Why All the Hype Lately? AI Infra Rocket, Bubble or Opportunity?
item.description: Lately, whenever AI comes up in the stock market, Broadcom(AVGO) follows almost like auto-complete, right? 'Why on earth is everyone crazy about this stock?', and 'Am I catching the top if I go in now?' I'll weave together earnings, leftover work, and big hand supply and demand to spell it out refreshingly.

item.title: [IONQ] Quantum computer leader jumps 20% in one day - Should I jump in now?
item.description: This post breaks down why IonQ suddenly jumped nearly 20%, how strong the Q4 earnings and 2026 guidance really were, and whether this is a flash-in-the-pan or real game-changer - straight talk from an investor's view.

item.title: "NVDA is crazy again" Why it's so hot today, an honest one-page summary
item.description: In this article, we try to solve the dilemma, "Is NVDA really taking off again, or is it overheated?" We will connect why it moved so much today with AI investment trends, policy, and supply-demand, drawing a 3-to-12-month outlook together.

item.title: QCOM Real Rebound After Plunge? Is It Time to Buy Qualcomm Now?
item.description: Qualcomm has been on a roller coaster with recent plunges and rebounds. What exactly is going on, and can we get in now without risk? Let’s slowly break it down over a drink.

item.title: TIRX Outlook and Risks: $1.5 Billion Bitcoin + InsurTech Merger, Does This Make Sense?
item.description: What happens if a local insurance agency suddenly announces a large Bitcoin purchase? That’s exactly the TIRX situation. It looks ridiculous, but let’s look together at what’s behind the numbers.

item.title: MoonLake (MLTX) Rises 20%! Is It Okay to Jump In Now?
item.description: Is this the same one that made shareholders cry blood after failing clinical trials last September? Today it’s come back completely transformed. Why is it rising so much, and whether this is 'the real deal'—we’ll clarify that exactly.
